arts.ttl: Serie A Week 7 Liveblog: Atalanta-Genoa and Inter-Torino
Torino’s new tactical approach: Ricci’s Role and Vlasic’s Impact against Inter
arts.sum: Torino are set to face Inter Milan with a renewed tactical approach, focusing on the midfield to create opportunities and surprise their opponents. Despite conceding eight goals in the first six matches of the season, manager Paolo Vanoli is not planning to radically change the team’s formation for the upcoming match at San Siro. Instead, he will stick with the 3-5-2 system that has made Torino one of the surprises of the early season. The midfield will play a crucial role in Torino’s strategy. arts.ttl: Simone Inzaghi’s Manchester United move ‘considered impossible’
arts.sum: Serie A giants Inter’s boss Simone Inzaghi has been linked with a move to Manchester United in recent days but it doesn’t seem as if the move will take off…

arts.ttl: Manchester United reportedly approached Inzaghi, Inter coach declines offer
arts.sum: According to recent reports, Manchester United has been actively exploring options to potentially replace their current manager, Erik ten Hag, during the international break. Journalist Tancredi Palmeri shared on social media that “Frantic contacts are ongoing at Manchester United to decide whether to proceed with a change of coach during the break.” In a surprising development, Palmeri further claimed that the Premier League giants had made a concrete offer to Inter Milan’s head coach, Simone Inzaghi. The report suggests that Manchester United approached Inzaghi with the proposition to take over immediately during the international pause. arts.ttl: Inter vs. Torino, a clash between two high-flyers
arts.sum: Inter have won their last four Serie A games against Torino without conceding a single goal; the Nerazzurri have only enjoyed a longer run of consecutive wins whilst also keeping a clean sheet in the competition against Atalanta (five between September 1951 and September 1953) and Genoa (seven between November 2018 and August 2021). Inter lost their last home match in Serie A to Milan, after a 17-game unbeaten run at home (W13 D4); the last time the Nerazzurri lose two consecutive home games in the competition was between March and April 2023.
